'''Zavirk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a trooper in the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. He professed to have joined the army in order to see [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. On the orders of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], Zavirk monitored the conversations between [[Five World Prime Minister]] [[Dur Gejjen]] and [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]], and later took part in the mission to [[Vulpter/Legends|Vulpter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
